features.name: blocking assignment to procedural register followed by read in same procedural block
features.description: Code should include a procedural always block with blocking assignments to registers followed by read operations that read those same registers within the same procedural block

features.name: combinational operation result from procedural register reads used in procedural context
features.description: Code should include a combinational operation (add, extract) applied to values read from procedural registers, where the result is used within the same procedural block where the registers are assigned

features.name: expression inlined as procedural variable initialization using procedural register reads
features.description: Code should include an expression using values read from procedural registers being inlined as an automatic variable initialization within a procedural block where those registers are also assigned
